name: Alfa USB Adapter AWUS1900
title: Alfa USB Adapter AWUS1900
description: The Alfa AWUS1900 is a USB WiFi adapter that operates under the IEEE 802.11ac standard, providing high-speed wireless connectivity. It is designed for users requiring substantial bandwidth and reliable signal strength across larger distances. The adapter features dual-band capabilities, supporting 2.4 GHz and 5 GHz frequencies, with maximum data speeds of 600 Mbps and 1300 Mbps, respectively. This performance is powered by the Realtek RTL8814AU chipset, known for its efficiency and stability in managing high-speed wireless connections. Technical details include the adapter's use of four 5dBi dual-band dipole antennas, which are essential for its extended range and improved signal penetration capabilities. These antennas are detachable and use RP-SMA female connectors, offering flexibility for users looking to enhance their wireless network's reach and reliability. The AWUS1900's notable strength in signal coverage makes it adept at overcoming physical obstructions, reducing WiFi dead zones within various environments. Its USB 3.0 interface ensures that the data transfer between the adapter and the computer is swift, minimizing the potential for bottlenecks in high-demand scenarios. The AWUS1900 supports a wide range of wireless security protocols, including 64/128-bit WEP, WPA/WPA2, WPA-PSK/WPA2-PSK, and WPS, ensuring that connections remain secure from unauthorized access. It is compatible with a variety of operating systems, including Windows XP through Windows 10, macOS 10.5 to 10.14, and different Linux distributions. This wide-ranging compatibility, combined with its robust performance characteristics, makes the AWUS1900 a suitable choice for users who need a reliable and powerful wireless connection for streaming HD video, high-volume data transfers, and other bandwidth-intensive applications.

comments.name: Dmytro
comments.text: Все хорошо, но дальность приема сигнала, оставляет желать лучшего. Плюс довольно громоздкий.

comments.text: The best wifi adapter of all i tested. Very big range

comments.text: Adapter is super,delivery the best-3 days.

comments.name: Samuel
comments.text: Best Wi-Fi, im use with kali Linux.

comments.name: Дмитрий
comments.text:
На Виндоус 11 AWUS1900 определяется сразу, даже не нужно специально устанавливать драйвера, они уже имеются в составе ОС. Работает адаптер на Виндоус 11 стабильно, не отваливается, в отличии от AWUS036ACH. По чувствительности приёма различий между AWUS1900 и AWUS036ACH не заметил. В WIFISLAX также определяются сразу оба адаптера, без ручной установки драйверов, причем 036ACH в этой ОС уже не отваливается в отличии от Виндоус 11.

On Windows 11, AWUS1900 is detected immediately, you don’t even need to specifically install drivers, they are already included in the OS. The adapter works on Windows 11 stably, does not fall off, unlike AWUS036ACH. In terms of reception sensitivity, I did not notice any differences between the AWUS1900 and AWUS036ACH. In WIFISLAX, both adapters are also detected at once, without manually installing drivers, and 036ACH in this OS no longer falls off, unlike Windows 11.
